packages.notes: Any Codable value is persistable via TransformerFactory.forCodable / Storage.transformCodable, wrapped in TypeWrapper; README: 'utilizes Codable in Swift 4 to perform serialization'.

evidence.note: Surface digest resolves this decl present on linux (no gap); source is Foundation-only under Source/Shared with no os() guards, but there is no Linux CI or README corroboration - confidence reduced.

packages.notes: Codable bridging is first-class: FetchableRecordDecoder (the Decodable row decoder) plus the FetchableRecord / PersistableRecord / EncodableRecord protocols are unconditional on all platforms. Codable structs conforming to these protocols get persistence and fetching for free (as shown in the README quick start).

packages.notes: Codable values are persisted as JSON strings in UserDefaults via TopLevelCodableBridge and related Codable bridges. Surface digest records zero per-platform gaps and zero #if conditions. linux left unknown: no gap-based absence evidence, but sources unconditionally import Apple-only frameworks.
